analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral announcement that Sergey Lavrov will chair an SCO Council of Foreign Ministers videoconference on May 13. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no mention of the West or moral judgments. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system to the West) – implicitly aligns: highlighting Russia chairing an SCO ministerial meeting showcases Russia’s role within a non-Western multilateral institution, suggesting leadership/engagement in an alternative framework. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – not expressed; no claims about peace, solidarity, or assistance. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – not claimed; no boasting of achievements. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally/naturally) – not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU2.
